_comment: dialogue_sylvaren.json: This table is used for the npc chat in Sylvaren.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome to Sylvaren, where twilight and truth walk hand in hand.
dialogue.help: We walk a delicate path here. Aid us in keeping the balance.
dialogue.lore: Sylvaren was founded by those who could not choose between two worlds—and so made their own.
dialogue.farewell: May your steps be sure, and your heart steady.

dialogue.greeting: The forest watches, even when you do not.
dialogue.help: A spirit beast has been sighted near the glade. We need a tracker.
dialogue.lore: The Verdant Kin believe every ranger is born with a bond to the land.

dialogue.greeting: A song can open doors no key ever could.
dialogue.help: We’re composing a harmony to calm the forest’s unrest. Will you lend your voice?
dialogue.lore: The Echoes of the Deep say Sylvaren’s twilight hums with forgotten melodies.
dialogue.farewell: Sing your truth, and the world will listen.
